name: WORKING HARD
description:
Your childhood sweetheart, Sasha, has been working overtime at the fourth-rate burger joint.

Why is that? Well... your poor father-in-law is sick and she has to help him. That's why she's been in longer than usual.

But she looks strangely suspicious. Especially that weird smell coming from her.

TW: futa (Nettle), NTR, possible death of Sasha's father
